failReason.TOOOLD:
It looks like you don’t meet the age requirement for this program. You must be between the ages of 18 - 35 to participate. If you believe you are seeing this message in error, please contact hello@artscardboston.com for assistance.

But no worries—there are still plenty of amazing ways to experience Boston’s arts and culture! Please explore the other events and opportunities available through ArtsCard Boston.

REJECTED.subtitle: Unfortunately, you no longer qualify for this program.
